results.rendered_html:
nir-√vā P. -vāti (pf. -vavau), to blow (as wind),  R. ;
to cease to blow, to be blown out or extinguished;
to be allayed or refreshed or exhilarated,  MBh. ;  Kāv.  &c.:
Caus. -vāpayati, to put out, extinguish, allay, cool, refresh, delight,  RV. ; &c.

results.rendered_html:
nirvā 2 P.
1 To blow.
2 To be cooled, be cool or assuaged (fig. also); vapurjalārdrāpavanairna nirvavau  Śi. 1. 65 ; tvayi dṛṣṭa eva tasyā nirvāti mano
(pb) manobhavajvalitaṃ  Subhāṣ. 
3 To blow out, be extinguished, be extinct; nirvāṇadīpe kimu tailadātaṃ  Subhāṣ. ; nirvāṇabhūyiṣṭhamathāsya vīryaṃ saṃdhukṣayaṃtīva vapurguṇena  Ku. 3. 52 ;  Śi. 14. 85 ;  Mu. 3. 28. 
— Caus. (vāpayati)
1 To blow or put out, extinguish destroy, kill;  R. 3. 58. 
2 To cool, alleviate the heat of, act as a refrigerant; sakhi anyādṛśa eva tedya nirvāpayati śarīrasparśaḥ  Māl. 6 ,  Ratn. 3. 11 ;  R. 19. 56. 
3 To gratify, soothe, comfort;  R. 12. 63.
